facebook.caption: POV: you're at Bãi Trường and somehow stumble into a Korean-run bakery with a 4.9-star rating inside a resort complex. LOLO BAKERY & CAFE hits different. Fresh pastries, proper coffee, and the kind of cozy corner you didn't think you'd find on a beach trip. 1,537 reviews at 4.9. That's not luck, that's consistency. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Walk inside LOLO BAKERY & CAFE at Sonasea and watch the pastry shelf clear out by 9am. 4.9 stars. 1,537 reviews. Now you know why.

instagram.caption: POV: found a 4.9-star Korean bakery hiding inside Sonasea resort on Bãi Trường. LOLO BAKERY & CAFE. 1,537 reviews don't lie. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Pastries disappearing fast at LOLO BAKERY & CAFE. 4.9 stars inside Sonasea, Bãi Trường. Go early.
